positive: A clean, minimalist illustration of cosmic celestial elements: a stylized crescent moon interacting with swirling nebulae and geometric constellations. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring strong, deep indigo and luminous gold contrast. Use thick, clean vector lines and flat color blocking reminiscent of modern Nordic design or art deco geometry. The nebulae should appear as soft, smoky gradients contrasted against sharp, crystalline stellar shapes. Highly detailed, high contrast, silhouette-friendly, perfect for repeating apparel pattern.
